characters.appearance: Young adult woman of South Asian descent. Slim build, medium complexion. Dark brown, straight hair parted in the middle. Distinctive sharp nose and expressive eyes.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, confident, and directly engaging with the viewer.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे लगता था मेरी English ठीक-ठाक है, until I tried this app. [I thought my English was okay, until I tried this app.]
Character A says: कुछ महीनों पहले, मैंने Supernova का AI speaking test try किया। [A few months ago, I tried Supernova's AI speaking test.]
Character A says: First time मेरा score सिर्फ 75% आया। [My score was only 75% the first time.]
Character A says: Customer service. [Customer service.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable misconception about their English skills.
- Introduces the app's diagnostic feature (AI speaking test) and establishes a baseline score.
- Shows the user actively engaging with a real-world vocabulary phrase.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I THOUGHT MY ENGLISH WAS OKAY, UNTIL I TRIED THIS APP. A FEW MONTHS AGO I TRIED SUPERNOVA'S AI SPEAKING TEST. THE FIRST TIME MY SCORE WAS ONLY 75%. Customer service. 79% Checking your pronunciation... 96% Checking your fluency... 100% Speaking Test Your Speech Level 75% Native Proficient Advanced Intermediate Beginner Novice Practice with AI Tutor Let's begin! Record yourself saying the phrase below. Customer service 82% Customer 68%

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे समझ ही नहीं आता था कि मैं गलती कहाँ कर रही हूँ। [I never understood where I was making mistakes.]
Character A says: फिर Supernova के AI tutor ने मुझे मेरी mistakes बताईं, and I started practicing रोज़ रात को सिर्फ 10 मिनट। [Then Supernova's AI tutor pointed out my mistakes, and I started practicing every night for just 10 minutes.]
Character A says: आज मैं दोबारा अपना speaking test ले रही हूँ, let's see my score! [Today I am taking my speaking test again, let's see my score!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the core problem: learners often don't know what they are doing wrong.
- Introduces the solution: daily, manageable practice (10 mins/day) with an AI tutor.
- Builds anticipation for the results of the second test.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I NEVER UNDERSTOOD WHERE I WAS MAKING MISTAKES. THEN SUPERNOVA'S AI TUTOR POINTED OUT MY MISTAKES AND I STARTED PRACTICING EVERY NIGHT FOR JUST 10 MINUTES. TODAY I AM TAKING MY SPEAKING TEST AGAIN, LET'S SEE MY SCORE! Pronunciation 67 Good Fluency 83 Great Your fluency is improving. We spotted a few words where your pronunciation needs work. We'll work on both. Word stress We found 2 words to practice. Interview 80% Coach You

scenes.scene_label: Second Test and Call to Action
scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Interview. [Interview.]
Character A says: Confidence. [Confidence.]
Character A says: 91%! Wow! [91%! Wow!]
Character A says: अगर आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova try करें! [If you also want to speak English without fear, try Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff: a significantly improved score demonstrating the app's effectiveness.
- Shows practice with practical, career-oriented vocabulary.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging Call to Action focused on overcoming fear.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: INTERVIEW. CONFIDENCE. 91%! TRY SUPERNOVA TODAY TO SPEAK ENGLISH WITHOUT FEAR. Practice with AI Tutor Great job! Let's keep going! interview 99% Practice with AI Tutor Nailed it! Let's move on. confidence 99% Your Speech Level 91% Native Proficient Advanced Intermediate Beginner Novice Supernova 97% Checking your fluency... 100% Speaking Test
